title: Simply Torch Blocks
description: Simply adds torch blocks of each colour to Minecraft.
body:
# Simply Torch Blocks
This mod adds a torch block of every colour to minecraft. If this mod breaks, report it [here!](https://discord.gg/46yEVu9gQH)
![all the torch blocks, showing off how they look with ctm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QMiZ5sk8/images/9c4b0202b242a8649258e7930b183407825302a7.png)

## How to get the blocks
![A 3x3 crafting grid with sticks in the corners, paper on the sides, and a torch in the center](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4813f440fc0dfbc45ed035f3f92d22ea8b7a2c5.png)
![a 3x3 crafting grid with a dye in the center and torch blocks around the edges](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QMiZ5sk8/images/e5ccb483712b33ce0a68a3ae07cf09080ed8b392.png)
You can craft one torch blocks using 4 sticks, 4 paper, and 1 torch. This gets you 4 white torch blocks. You can then surround a dye with any 8 torch blocks to get a dyed torch block of that colour.

### CTM support
If [ConnectedTexturesMod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ctm) or any mods that use its system are installed, the blocks will display with a connected texture. CTM is not required to use the mod

### Notes and thanks
I wanted to see if i could make this mod, so I did! This mod was the first ever mod I published, so it holds a special place in my heart.

[Here](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simply-torch-blocks) is the version of this mod hosted on CurseForge.

[Here](https://github.com/caittastic/SimplyTorchBlock) is the mod's github repository.

This mod is proudly made by a member of the LGBT community. Trans rights are human rights🏳️‍⚧️.
